description: Add an E2E test that verifies the browser-extension npm package includes the .extension-hash file and that the hash matches the embedded window.__EXTENSION_HASH__ in the side panel bundle. This catches packaging bugs where critical files are missing from the npm package's files field — the exact bug that caused the v0.0.88 ExtensionUpdateDialog infinite reload loop.

userStories.title: Add E2E test verifying .extension-hash is present in npm package and matches embedded hash
userStories.description: Add a test that packs the browser-extension package as an npm tarball, extracts it, and verifies that .extension-hash exists and its content matches the hash embedded in dist/side-panel/side-panel.js. This prevents regressions where .extension-hash is accidentally removed from the package.json files field.
acceptanceCriteria: Test runs npm pack on platform/browser-extension and extracts the tarball to a temp directory
Test asserts .extension-hash file exists in the extracted package
Test asserts dist/side-panel/side-panel.js exists and starts with a window.__EXTENSION_HASH__ assignment
Test asserts the hash in .extension-hash matches the hash embedded in side-panel.js
Test cleans up temp files in a finally block
